To find yourself, think for yourself.
Unless you're ashamed of yourself now and then, you're not honest.
The less you talk about your shame, the more of it you have.
Some of us learn from other people's mistakes and the rest of us have to be other people.
You don't have to control your thoughts; you just have to stop letting them control you.
As mortals, we're ruled by conditions, not by ourselves.
Work out your own salvation. Do not depend on others.
Doing the best at this moment puts you in the best place for the next moment.
You can start changing our world for the better daily, no matter how small the action.
If you want to be successful, find someone who has achieved the results you want and copy what they do and you'll achieve the same results.
Do good by stealth, and blush to find it fame.
You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.
The more perfect a person is on the outside, the more demons they have on the inside.
When you reach the top of the mountain, keep climbing.
Education breeds confidence. Confidence breeds hope. Hope breeds peace.
The greatest test of courage on earth is to bear defeat without losing heart.
Man must use what he has, not hope for what is not.
If you do not conquer self, you will be conquered by self.
You can do two things at once, but you can't focus effectively on two things at once.
People think you're crazy if you talk about things they don't understand.
Be willing to be a beginner every single morning.
Nothing in this world is worth having or worth doing unless it means effort, pain, difficulty.
No one can hurt you without your consent.
In the middle of chaos lies opportunity.
You will have bad times, but they will always wake you up to the stuff you weren't paying attention to.
If the only prayer you ever say in your entire life is thank you, it will be enough.
Anger, ego, jealousy are the biggest diseases,Keep yourself aloof from these three diseases.
Death and life have their determined appointments; riches and honors depend upon heaven.
Tall oaks grow from little acorns.
Your heart is the size of an ocean. Go find yourself in its hidden depths.
The greatest deception men suffer is from their own opinions.
No matter what happens in life, never lose sight of who you are.
Abundance of knowledge does not teach men to be wise.
Talk does not cook rice.
Just because you are happy it does not mean that the day is perfect but that you have looked beyond its imperfections.
Fiction is the truth inside the lie.
If you want to achieve greatness stop asking for permission.
Life is growth. If we stop growing, technically and spiritually, we are as good as dead.
Every failure brings with it the seed of an equivalent success.
Self-control is strength.
Someone who points out your flaws to you is not necessarily your enemy. Someone who speaks of your virtues is not necessarily your friend.
You cannot swim for new horizons until you have courage to lose sight of the shore.
People seldom do what they believe in. They do what is convenient, then repent.
Change is never easy, but always possible.
You can have results or excuses, but not both.
A hopeless man is a very desperate and dangerous man, almost a dead man.
Don't stumble over something that's behind you.
If you love life, don't waste time, for time is what life is made up of.
To judge a man by his weakest link or deed is like judging the power of the ocean by one wave.
Believe in your infinite potential. Your only limitations are those you set upon yourself.
